scripts.build: pnpm run clean && pnpm --filter @neon-wreckers/integrations run build && pnpm --filter @neon-wreckers/ui run build && pnpm run db:generate && tsc -p infrastructure/database/tsconfig.json && pnpm --filter @neon-wreckers/api run build && pnpm --filter @neon-wreckers/worker run build && pnpm --filter @neon-wreckers/web run build && pnpm --filter @neon-wreckers/admin run build && pnpm --filter @neon-wreckers/overlay run build
scripts.test: pnpm run clean && pnpm run test:engine && pnpm run test:api && pnpm run test:content && pnpm run test:dependencies && pnpm run test:repository
scripts.verify: pnpm run test && pnpm run build
